originalTitle: US groups urge investigation into child safety and spending on Roblox
summary: Roblox said it had "clear policies" banning actual and simulated gambling, as well as rules governing paid random items.
content: Roblox said it had "clear policies" banning actual and simulated gambling, as well as rules governing paid random items.
chineseTitle: 美国团体敦促对儿童安全和 Roblox 支出进行调查
chineseSummary: Roblox 表示，它有“明确的政策”禁止实际和模拟赌博，以及管理付费随机项目的规则。
chineseContent: Roblox 表示，它有“明确的政策”禁止实际和模拟赌博，以及管理付费随机项目的规则。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
